title: Suzaki Paradise: Red Light District
writer: Toshirô Ide, Yoshiko Shibaki, Nobuyoshi Terada
actors: Michiyo Aratama, Yukiko Todoroki, Seizaburô Kawazu
plot: A couple stand indecisively on a bridge in Asakusa. Tsutae and Yoshiji have lost confidence and passion for their future as they get on the bus for Tsukishima and get off at Suzaki. Across the bridge they see the sign for Suzaki P...
